'''sabowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadburner|roadburner]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-b-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadburner|roadburner]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sabowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæbeweth|sæbeweth]] || [[word:sæbewej|sæbewej]] || [[word:sæbewesh|sæbewesh]] || [[word:sæbewe|sæbewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sabobowoth|sabobowoth]] || [[word:sabobowoj|sabobowoj]] || [[word:sabobowosh|sabobowosh]] || [[word:sabobowo|sabobowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sabowoth|sabowoth]] || [[word:sabowoj|sabowoj]] || [[word:sabowosh|sabowosh]] || [[word:sabowo|sabowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sabofwoth|sabofwoth]] || [[word:sabofwoj|sabofwoj]] || [[word:sabofwosh|sabofwosh]] || [[word:sabofwof|sabofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sabowotho|sabowotho]] || [[word:sabowojo|sabowojo]] || [[word:sabowosho|sabowosho]] || [[word:sabowoko|sabowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sabowoth|sabowoth]] || [[word:sabowoj|sabowoj]] || [[word:sabowosh|sabowosh]] || [[word:sabowo|sabowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sabowothol|sabowothol]] || [[word:sabowojol|sabowojol]] || [[word:sabowoshol|sabowoshol]] || [[word:sabowokol|sabowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sabowothotho|sabowothotho]] || [[word:sabowojojo|sabowojojo]] || [[word:sabowoshosho|sabowoshosho]] || [[word:sabowoko|sabowoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sabowothon|sabowothon]] || [[word:sabowojon|sabowojon]] || [[word:sabowoshon|sabowoshon]] || [[word:sabowokon|sabowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sabowothoro|sabowothoro]] || [[word:sabowojoro|sabowojoro]] || [[word:sabowoshoro|sabowoshoro]] || [[word:sabowokoro|sabowokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
